items.name_cn:
Model 781392 Large
Size 34/32/17cm
Gucci Ophidia hobo shoulder bag
Today's vibe is given by the hobo!!!
This bag really fits into daily life, casual yet stylish.
Large capacity but lightweight and compact, perfectly satisfying daily outings.
Plus, the strap is longer than most shoulder bags and adjustable.
Love at first sight, stylish and practical!

Model: 499623 Black
Size: 25x14x8cm
Gucci Dionysus Diamond-Clasp
True fan favorite, absolutely stunning.
Preserves the perfect lineage of the Dionysus bag,
but ushers in a new era of Dionysus leather!
The most valuable part of the bag is the tiger head diamond clasp.
A treasure item. Not a market item.
Very light, perfect size, highly recommended.

items.name_en: Ophidia Small Handbag Monogram (with Crossbody Strap)
items.name_cn:
Ophidia Small Handbag Monogram (with Crossbody Strap)
The GG logo evolved from the Gucci diamond quilted pattern of the 1930s and has since become a traditional symbol of the brand. This small handbag from the new Ophidia collection incorporates this highly recognizable pattern. Double G accessories add charm to the overall look.
Dimensions: 15.5*25*6cm
Style No.: 735132

Gucci Jackie Series Small Shoulder Bag
This brand-new Gucci Jackie Series shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and the included strap with red and green webbing add more styling possibilities to this small shoulder bag in light brown leather.
Model: 782849
Color: Light Brown Full Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm

items.name_en: Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability design, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather material, a slightly structured body, a flap closure, and double G accessories. This bag features a versatile carrying design, easily switching between a shoulder bag and a handbag by sliding the metal chain. Light beige quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold-tone hardware, suede microfiber lining, double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also usable as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
items.name_cn:
Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability design, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather material, a slightly structured body, a flap closure, and double G accessories. This bag features a versatile carrying design, easily switching between a shoulder bag and a handbag by sliding the metal chain. Light beige quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold-tone hardware, suede microfiber lining, double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also usable as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 443497.
Dimensions: 26(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Light Pink/Original leather.
Model height: 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick
